description: ASR and VAD Testing - Create comprehensive tests for transcribe and VAD modules using audio files

userStories.title: Create audio file loader utility for tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a utility to load MP3 audio files and convert them to PCM format for testing.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/conftest.py with audio loader fixtures
Add helper function load_audio_file() to read MP3 from /Users/didi/Downloads/audio/en/clips
Convert MP3 to PCM int16 format at 16kHz sample rate using pydub
Return async iterator of audio chunks (4096 samples each)
Select 5-10 representative audio files and list them in AUDIO_TEST_FILES constant
Add pydub to project dependencies if not present
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Test MistralTranscribeClient basic transcription
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify the transcribe client can recognize speech from audio files.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/test_transcribe.py
Test TranscribeSessionCreated event is received with valid request_id
Test TranscribeTextDelta events are received and contain non-empty text
Test TranscribeDone event is received at end of stream
Assert full recognized text is non-empty and contains English words
Test skips if MISTRAL_API_KEY env var is not set
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Test transcription error handling
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify the transcribe client handles errors gracefully.
acceptanceCriteria: Add test for empty audio stream in tests/test_transcribe.py
Add test for invalid audio format (non-PCM data)
Verify TranscribeError events are properly yielded for invalid input
Tests complete without hanging or crashing (use pytest timeout)
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Create VAD+ASR integration test with AudioBroadcaster
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to test parallel VAD and ASR processing using AudioBroadcaster.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/test_vad_asr_integration.py
Use AudioBroadcaster to split audio stream to both VAD and ASR consumers
Run VAD and ASR in parallel using asyncio.gather
Collect transcription results and VAD events concurrently
Verify both VAD events and transcription results are received
Test skips if MISTRAL_API_KEY env var is not set
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Test silence detection stops transcription
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify that transcription stops when silence is detected.
acceptanceCriteria: Add test in tests/test_vad_asr_integration.py for silence stopping transcription
Create synthetic audio: speech chunk followed by silence chunks
Verify VAD emits VADStateChange from SPEAKING to SILENCE
Verify VAD emits VADSilenceTimeout after 1.5s silence (default config)
Verify transcription stops when VADSilenceTimeout is received
Use SimpleVAD with default config (silence_threshold=0.10, silence_duration=1.5)
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Test continuous speech without silence timeout
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify transcription continues for continuous speech without premature timeout.
acceptanceCriteria: Add test in tests/test_vad_asr_integration.py for continuous speech
Use real audio file containing continuous speech
Verify no VADSilenceTimeout is emitted during speech
Verify full transcription text is received
Verify TranscribeDone is received at stream end
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
